# Application: [Project Name]

## Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] I have read the [README](../README.md) and understand the program structure.
- [ ] I have read the [Application Guidelines](../docs/application-guidelines.md).
- [ ] My project is built on Solana.
- [ ] My project has not launched on mainnet yet.
- [ ] I have a working devnet prototype or proof of concept.
- [ ] I have filled out every section of the application template.
- [ ] My application file is named `applications/my_project_name.md` (lowercase, underscores).
- [ ] This PR contains only my application file and no other changes.
- [ ] I understand that my application will be public.

## Summary

> Briefly describe your project in 2-3 sentences.

## Team Size

> How many people are on your team?

## Category

> DeFi / NFT / Payments / Social / Gaming / Tooling / Data / DAO / Infrastructure / Other
